title: <div><b>Invitation to Collaborate: Omni-Dromenon-Engine Narrative Co-Architectur
content:
Invitation to Collaborate: Omni-Dromenon-Engine Narrative Co-Architecture

Chris,

I’m inviting you to join me as a narrative co-architect for the Omni-Dromenon-Engine—a real-time, audience-input performance system. This is not a commission; it’s an intellectual partnership to establish the dramaturgical foundation for all future collaborations.

---

System Overview



  • Omni-Dromenon-Engine: A platform where audiences become computational agents, influencing narrative, emotional tone, and thematic focus in real time, while maintaining performer authority.
  • Technical Achievements:
    • 70+ pages of documented frameworks across 47+ project files
    • Proof-of-concept prototype with sub-100ms latency
    • Full Node.js server infrastructure, real-time consensus algorithms, audience/performer interfaces
    • 11 modular GitHub repositories with professional infrastructure
  • Core Innovation: A cross-disciplinary, real-time architecture unifying theater, music, dance, opera, and visual art under a single audience-agency framework.
